name: Ambrose Akinmusire
abstract: Ambrose Olusiji Akinmusire ( born May 1, 1982) is an American avant-garde jazz trumpeter and composer.

concerts.label: Carnegie Hall Workshop for Jazz Ensembles Concert

about_quotes.speaker: Jack DeJohnette
about_quotes.evidence: The people that I had in mind to do this project were: ... the exciting trumpeter Ambrose Akinmusire ... Ambrose plays some great trumpet on it.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jack DeJohnette — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Jason Palmer
about_quotes.evidence: I think of people like Ambrose Akinmusire... those trumpet players they have that thing where they have a very unique, recognizable voice
about_quotes.doc_title: Jason Palmer interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 2, 2025
